name: Discord
description: Discord started as a gaming chat platform but has evolved into a powerful community and team communication tool. Popular with developer communities, startups, and online communities who want channels, voice rooms, and bot integrations.
use_cases: You're building a developer community or open-source project and need channels, forums, and voice rooms without paying per member
Your startup wants team communication with persistent voice channels for spontaneous collaboration, not just scheduled calls
You run an online community (paid or free) and want bots to automate moderation, onboarding, and member roles
Your community or team is cost-sensitive and the free tier covers all core communication needs without per-seat fees
